originalTitle: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
content: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

originalTitle: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
title: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
content: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, who came third and fourth respectively in the last elections, switch parties.

originalTitle: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
title: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
content: Unwitting donors hand over money to save suffering animals but Ugandan con artists pocket the cash.

originalTitle: For Christians in Israel and Jerusalem, intolerance is becoming normal
title: For Christians in Israel and Jerusalem, intolerance is becoming normal
content: Despite official framing, for Christians there is little new in last week's assault on a French nun in East Jerusalem.

originalTitle: Brazil’s Lula to travel to US to meet with Trump later this week
title: Brazil’s Lula to travel to US to meet with Trump later this week
content: Media reports say the Brazilian president will meet with his US counterpart in the White House in the coming days.

originalTitle: Hormuz tensions push ceasefire to the brink as Trump threatens Iran
title: Hormuz tensions push ceasefire to the brink as Trump threatens Iran
content: US military says it is encouraging ships to pass through Hormuz Strait, but Iran says it is in full control of waterway.

originalTitle: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
title: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
content: Shipping company Maersk says one of its US-flagged commercial vessels has successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.

originalTitle: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
content: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

originalTitle: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
title: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
content: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch husband and wife, as well as a German national, have died but the cause has not yet been established.

originalTitle: A remarkable finale - but will 13 chaotic minutes cost Man City title?
title: A remarkable finale - but will 13 chaotic minutes cost Man City title?
content: A chaotic 13-minute spell from Man City in the second half of a six-goal thriller at Everton could prove to be the visitors' undoing in the Premier League title race.

originalTitle: 'Pure theatre puts Hearts on cusp of title fairytale'
title: 'Pure theatre puts Hearts on cusp of title fairytale'
content: BBC Scotland chief sports writer Tom English sums up the chaos and cacophony of Hearts' win over Rangers at Tynecastle.

originalTitle: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
content: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?
